Assembly: The assembly ilPteHara1.hap1.1 is based on 36x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Wellcome Sanger Institute Tree of Life Programme (https://www.sanger.ac.uk/programme/tree-of-life/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Z chromosome identified based on BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements ( https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4).The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 8 (1 - 430 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 9 (1 - 654 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 18 (6,100 - 6,700 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 19 (1 - 390 & 3,850 - 5,090 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 28 (1 - 500 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 29 (1 - 280 & 3,590 - 3,800 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 33 (1 - 850 & 9,400 - 11,377 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 38 (1 - 280 & 8,900 - 9,749 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 39 (1 - 1,100 & 8,500 - 9,525 Kbp) are unknown.The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 41 (1 - 374 Kbp) are unknown.

Assembly: The assembly icMycAtom3.1 is based on 133x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. A manually phased assembly (based on HiC signal) was generated from a jointly curated primary and alt assembly. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. X chromosome identified based on BUSCO gene painting with ancestral coleopteran linkage groups.No Y chromosome was identifiedThe order and orientation of scaffolds in the following regions is uncertain:Chromosome 4 between approximately 4.50-5.37MbChromosome 5 between approximately 5.78-6.42MbChromosome 6 from the start to approximately 1.02MbChromosome 8 between approximately 2.35-3.17MbChromosome X between approximately 4.3-4.8Mb.
